name: AreaGuard-HiroTeam

readme_markdown:
# AreaGuard-HiroTeam [API 4] ![AreaGuard](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/76572999/151222006-b93a3691-29c4-4942-8d53-58ef6e52dbbc.png) ### About `[ENG]` This is a [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) (or forks) plugin allows you to protect your areas ! :grin:

`[FRA]` C'est un [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) plugin qui vous permet de protéger vos zones ! :grin:
--- ### How to use `[ENG]` Do the command ```/ag``` and follow the instruction simply `[FRA]` Faire la commande ```/ag``` et suivre les instructions tout simplement
- **Features**
- ```place, break, use, pvp, damage, drop, explosion, fly, hunger``` - ```Soon: blocked commands list, chat, effects list, msg enter area, msg quit area``` - **Permissions**
| Permission | Allow to | |--|--| | ```place.AREA_NAME``` | place block | | ```break.AREA_NAME``` | break block | | ```use.AREA_NAME``` | use/interact | | ```drop.AREA_NAME``` | drop | | ```fly.AREA_NAME``` | fly | | ```AREA_NAME = *``` | Authorize all areas | --- ### **This plugin was tested (and works) on:** - [x] **[PocketMine-MP 4.X.X](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP)** --- ### Contacts HiroTeam - **Discord Member:** WillyDuGang#6947 RomainSav#1000 - **Discord Server:** :link: https://discord.gg/WuwsuUA
- **E-mail:** team.hiroshima.dev@gmail.com
> ![HiroTeam](https://www.zupimages.net/up/20/25/mb59.png)
